metadata.description: Your Microsoft Entra tenant Id
Length for generated passwords that are stored in Key Vault
Secret name in Key Vault for the Windows admin password
Username for Windows account
Enable automatic logon into ArcBox Virtual Machine
Override default RDP port using this parameter. Default is 3389. No changes will be made to the client VM.
SQL Server edition to deploy. Valid values are: 'Developer', 'Standard', 'Enterprise'
Target GitHub account
Target GitHub repository name (under githubAccount)
Path inside the repo to the migration demo root (no leading slash, trailing slash required)
Target GitHub branch
Choice to deploy Bastion to connect to the client VM
Bastion host Sku name. The Developer SKU is currently supported in a limited number of regions: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/bastion/quickstart-developer-sku
Seed suffix used for deterministic generated credentials

Use this parameter to enable or disable debug mode for the automation scripts on the client VM, effectively configuring PowerShell ErrorActionPreference to Break. Intended for use when troubleshooting automation scripts. Default is false.
Name of the NAT Gateway
The naming prefix for the nested virtual machines and all Azure resources deployed. The maximum length for the naming prefix is 7 characters, example: `MigDem-Win2k19`
Azure Migrate project resource name. Azure Migrate allows only letters, numbers, and hyphens, so the default uses `Migration-Test` as the resource-safe form of `Migration Test`.
Timezone for the auto-shutdown schedule. Uses Windows timezone IDs as accepted by Azure DevTest Labs.
Option to enable spot pricing for the ArcBox Client VM
The availability zone for the Virtual Machine, public IP, and data disk for the ArcBox client VM
The name of your Virtual Machine
Username for the Virtual Machine

Password for Windows account. Password must have 3 of the following: 1 lower case character, 1 upper case character, 1 number, and 1 special character. The value must be between 12 and 123 characters long
The Windows version for the VM. This will pick a fully patched image of this given Windows version
Location for all resources
Resource Id of the subnet in the virtual network
The naming prefix for the nested virtual machines. Example: MigDem-Win2k19
Choice to deploy Bastion to connect to the client VM
The SKU of the VMs disk
Timezone for the auto-shutdown schedule. Uses Windows timezone IDs as accepted by Azure DevTest Labs.
The availability zone for the Virtual Machine, public IP, and data disk for the ArcBox client VM
Option to enable spot pricing for the ArcBox Client VM
Name of the VNet
Name of the subnet in the virtual network
Name of the subnet in the virtual network
Name of the Domain Controller subnet in the virtual network
Name of the DR VNet
Name of the DR subnet in the DR virtual network
Name of the NAT Gateway
Name of the DR network NAT Gateway
The flavor of ArcBox to deploy. This migration demo supports ITPro only.
Azure Region to deploy the Log Analytics Workspace
Choice to deploy Bastion to connect to the client VM
Bastion host Sku name
Name of the Network Security Group
Name of the Bastion Network Security Group
DNS Server configuration
The naming prefix for the nested virtual machines. Example: MigDem-Win2k19

Password for Windows account. Password must have 3 of the following: 1 lower case character, 1 upper case character, 1 number, and 1 special character. The value must be between 12 and 123 characters long
Key Vault secret name for the generated Windows admin password

properties.subnets: [if(and(equals(parameters('deployBastion'), false()), not(equals(parameters('flavor'), 'DataOps'))), variables('primarySubnet'), if(and(equals(parameters('deployBastion'), false()), equals(parameters('flavor'), 'DataOps')), union(variables('primarySubnet'), variables('dataOpsSubnets')), if(and(equals(parameters('deployBastion'), true()), not(equals(parameters('flavor'), 'DataOps'))), union(variables('primarySubnet'), variables('bastionSubnet')), if(and(equals(parameters('deployBastion'), true()), equals(parameters('flavor'), 'DataOps')), union(variables('primarySubnet'), variables('bastionSubnet'), variables('dataOpsSubnets')), variables('primarySubnet')))))]

properties.ipConfigurations: [if(not(equals(parameters('bastionSku'), 'Developer')), createArray(createObject('name', 'IpConf', 'properties', createObject('publicIPAddress', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('bastionPublicIpAddressName'))), 'subnet', createObject('id', variables('bastionSubnetRef'))))), null())]

metadata.description: Object ID of the client VM system-assigned managed identity that runs azcmagent connect for nested VMs.
The name of your Virtual Machine
Username for the Virtual Machine
Enable automatic logon into ArcBox Virtual Machine
Override default RDP port using this parameter. Default is 3389. No changes will be made to the client VM.
Location for all resources
Your Microsoft Entra tenant Id
The base URL used for accessing artifacts and automation artifacts.
The naming prefix for the nested virtual machines. Example: MigDem-Win2k19
The flavor of ArcBox to deploy. This migration demo supports ITPro only.
SQL Server edition to deploy. Valid values are: 'Developer', 'Standard', 'Enterprise'
Use this parameter to enable or disable debug mode for the automation scripts on the client VM, effectively configuring PowerShell ErrorActionPreference to Break. Default is false.
Windows time zone ID (as accepted by Azure DevTest Labs and tzutil/Set-TimeZone) applied to the Hyper-V host and nested VMs. Example: 'Central Standard Time'.

protectedSettings.commandToExecute: [format('powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File Bootstrap.ps1 -adminUsername {0} -tenantId {1} -subscriptionId {2} -resourceGroup {3} -azureLocation {4} -templateBaseUrl {5} -flavor {6} -vmAutologon {7} -rdpPort {8} -namingPrefix {9} -debugEnabled {10} -sqlServerEdition {11} -autoShutdownEnabled {12} -autoShutdownTimezone "{13}"', parameters('windowsAdminUsername'), parameters('tenantId'), subscription().subscriptionId, resourceGroup().name, parameters('location'), parameters('templateBaseUrl'), parameters('flavor'), parameters('vmAutologon'), parameters('rdpPort'), parameters('namingPrefix'), parameters('debugEnabled'), parameters('sqlServerEdition'), parameters('autoShutdownEnabled'), parameters('autoShutdownTimezone'))]
